flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Reading Area Community College rose 13% between 2006 and 2009 ($7.4k → $8.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Reading Area Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Reading Area Community College fell 27% between 2017 and 2020 ($12.0k → $8.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Reading Area Community College rose 23% between 2006 and 2009 (3.6k → 4.5k).
